# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest release line receives security updates.

| Version    | Supported          |
| ---------- | ------------------ |
| latest     | :white_check_mark: |
| < latest   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not open a public issue.** Instead, report vulnerabilities privately via:

→ [**Report a security vulnerability**](https://github.com/amonstack/gitea_mcp/security/advisories/new)

This opens a private [GitHub Security Advisory](https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/security-advisories/working-with-repository-security-advisories/about-repository-security-advisories) where we can triage, discuss, and coordinate a fix confidentially.

If you do not have access to GitHub Security Advisories, you may email the maintainer directly. The Advisory channel is strongly preferred.

## Response Commitment

| Milestone                          | Target       |
| ---------------------------------- | ------------ |
| Acknowledge receipt               | 72 hours     |
| Publish a fix or a mitigation     | 14 days      |

Timelines are best-effort and may extend for complex or low-severity issues. We will keep you updated throughout.

## Scope

This policy covers the published npm package (`@amonstack/gitea-mcp`), its source repository, and the MCP server binary. Infrastructure (CI, hosting), upstream dependencies, and documentation are out of scope unless a vulnerability in those areas directly compromises this project's security.

## Disclosure

Once a fix is published we will release a security advisory. Credit will be given to the reporter unless they request anonymity.

## Hall of Fame

Names or pseudonyms of reporters are added here with their permission.
